name: How much can I get if AI error cost me my settlement?

mainEntity.name: How much can I get if AI error cost me my settlement?

acceptedAnswer.description: Damages equal to lost settlement plus fees. Context: Malpractice awards based on provable losses; e.g., $100k+ cases. Key factors: Causation proof, mitigation efforts. Practical guidance: Calculate economic harm, expert valuation, negotiate first. Averages $50k-$500k.
